Village pub

The Glenisle Inn

Come and have a pint or a soft drink, meet up with folk, play darts or pool, watch the sport and enjoy a light bite.

Our village pub is open Friday, Saturday & Sunday from 6pm — please check the Glenisle Inn Facebook page for any changes to opening times or for upcoming sporting and seasonal events.

Opening Hours

Monday 2pm – 10pm
Tuesday Closed
Wednesday Closed
Thursday 4pm – 11pm
Friday 3pm – midnight
Saturday 2pm – midnight
Sunday 1pm – 10pm

Check the Glenisle Facebook page for last-minute changes.

Contact

✉ theglenisleinn@gmail.com
